name: Putprop Limited
summary: Putprop Limited operates as a property investment company in South Africa. The company operates through Industrial, Retail, and Commercial segments. It invests in industrial, commercial, and retail properties. As of June 30, 2020, the company had a portfolio of 14 properties with a gross lettable area of 68,553 square meters located primarily in the Johannesburg and Pretoria metropolitan areas of Gauteng. The company was formerly known as Putco Properties Limited and changed its name to Putprop Limited in 2006. Putprop Limited is based in Johannesburg, South Africa. Putprop Limited is a subsidiary of Carleo Enterprises Proprietary Limited.
